name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
notes: This rule defines all Cloud sources on the system.
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail, Microsoft Office 365, Box, Microsoft Azure Platform, Amazon GuardDuty, Google G Suite Activity Reports, Google Cloud Audit, Google Cloud Platform Firewall, Amazon VPC Flow Logs, Microsoft Azure Active Directory
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail, Microsoft Office 365, Box, Microsoft Azure Platform, Amazon GuardDuty, Google G Suite Activity Reports, Google Cloud Audit, Google Cloud Platform Firewall, Amazon VPC Flow Logs, Microsoft Azure Active Directory
